name: Crista Black
bio: Crista Black is the incumbent Place 4 trustee on the Longview ISD Board of Trustees and serves as board Assistant Secretary. An LISD graduate and career educator since 2001, she taught and later served as an instructional specialist and ELA curriculum coordinator in Pine Tree ISD. She was president of the LISD Education Foundation when she filed unopposed in 2023 to succeed the retiring Ginia Northcutt. She is a recipient of both the Pine Tree Middle School Teacher of the Year and Pine Tree District Elementary Teacher of the Year awards.

conflictsOfInterest.description: Simultaneously President of Longview ISD Education Foundation (a 501(c)(3) that raises money for district programs) and LISD trustee at time of 2023 filing. Common in smaller districts but creates a fundraising vs governance dual role that voters should understand.
conflictsOfInterest.label: FACT

conflictsOfInterest.description: Historical and possibly current Pine Tree ISD employment while serving as LISD trustee. Pine Tree is a neighboring district in the same county with potential shared vendors and regional cooperative ties.
conflictsOfInterest.label: DOCUMENTED_INFERENCE
